## Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the bug. -->

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What you expected to happen. -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or console output. -->

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem. -->

## Environment

- **Browser:** <!-- e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17 -->
- **OS:** <!-- e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- **Screen Size:** <!-- e.g., Desktop 1920x1080, Mobile 375x812 -->
- **User Role:** <!-- e.g., Admin, Manager, Handler, Viewer -->
- **Organization:** <!-- if relevant, the organization context -->

## API Response (if applicable)

<!-- Include the API response body and status code if the bug involves an API call. -->

```json

```

## Console Errors (if applicable)

<!-- Include any browser console errors. -->

```

```

## Severity

- [ ] Critical - System is unusable, data loss, security issue
- [ ] High - Major feature is broken, no workaround
- [ ] Medium - Feature is broken but workaround exists
- [ ] Low - Minor issue, cosmetic, or edge case

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context about the problem. Include related issues or PRs if applicable. -->
